label: Stream profiles
title: Stream Profiles
description: Manage reusable scrcpy launch parameters for headset streams.

list.title: Profiles
list.emptyDescription: Create a profile to define scrcpy geometry, video and audio parameters.

editor.noSelectionDescription: Choose a profile from the list or create a new one.

hints.name: Use a clear operator-facing name.
hints.description: Optional note for when this profile should be used.
hints.crop: Defines the source rectangle as width:height:x:y.
hints.maxSize: Limits the maximum width or height of the video stream.
hints.maxFps: Limits the maximum stream frame rate.
hints.videoBitRate: Affects video quality and network load. Examples: 4M, 8M, 12M.
hints.videoCodec: Defines the video codec. H.264 is the default option.
hints.noAudio: When enabled, scrcpy uses --no-audio and audio keeps playing on the headset.

validation.cropFormat: Crop must use width:height:x:y with positive width and height.
validation.maxSize: Maximum image size must be a positive integer.
validation.maxFps: Maximum FPS must be a positive integer.
validation.videoBitRate: Video bitrate must use scrcpy format, for example 6M.

delete.used: This profile is assigned to {count} device(s). Reassign those devices before deleting it.
